# TripOfOne

> Personal AI travel guide companion that builds one hyper-personalized itinerary per traveler, based on individual taste and real-time city data — launching first in Barcelona.

## Product
- Problem: traditional travel guides send every visitor to the same crowded landmarks and generic top-10 lists.
- Solution: TripOfOne maps live city events, neighborhood-level data, and each user's specific taste profile to build a single personalized itinerary per traveler, instead of generic options.
- First destination city: Barcelona.
- Launch: 2027.
- Current status: early bird waitlist, free access.

## Company
- Founder: Alex Berdonces, Founder & Product Lead.
- Based in Barcelona, Spain.
- Contact: hello@tripofone.com
- Market context: the AI travel planning industry was estimated at $5.2B in 2025.

## Investors & Partners
- TripOfOne is scheduling venture and ecosystem meetings ahead of the FutureTravel Summit 2026 in Barcelona.
- Contact: hello@tripofone.com (subject: Partnership / Investment)

## FAQ
- What are the best things to do in Barcelona using AI? TripOfOne acts as an AI travel companion that eliminates generic lists. It analyzes live events, personal taste, and real-time parameters to map a single, perfect itinerary tailored strictly to the traveler.
- How does TripOfOne fix crowded travel itineraries? Traditional lists lead everyone to the same crowded spots. TripOfOne resolves this by mapping non-generic localized paths, matching unique user behaviors with neighborhood data.
